<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="structure-prompts-with-xml-tags"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Structure prompts with XML tags</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">XML tags help Claude parse complex prompts unambiguously, especially when your prompt mixes instructions, context, examples, and variable inputs. Wrapping each type of content in its own tag (e.g. <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;instructions&gt;</code>, <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;context&gt;</code>, <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;input&gt;</code>) reduces misinterpretation.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Best practices:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Use consistent, descriptive tag names across your prompts.</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Nest tags when content has a natural hierarchy (documents inside <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;documents&gt;</code>, each inside <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;document index=&quot;n&quot;&gt;</code>).</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="give-claude-a-role"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Give Claude a role</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Setting a role in the system prompt focuses Claude&#x27;s behavior and tone for your use case. Even a single sentence makes a difference:</p>

  justify-center

xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15.188 5.11a.5.5 0 0 1 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm overflow-x-auto code-block-scroll" tabindex="0"><div class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><pre class="shiki shiki-themes github-light-default dark-plus" style="--shiki-light:#1f2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6;--shiki-light-bg:transparent;--shiki-dark-bg:transparent" tabindex="0"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#C586C0">import</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> anthropic</span></span>
<span class="line"></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">client </span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6"> anthropic.Anthropic()</span></span>

<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#953800;--shiki-dark:#9CDCFE">    messages</span><span style="--shiki-light:#CF222E;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">=</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">[</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">        {</span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"role"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"user"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">, </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"content"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">: </span><span style="--shiki-light:#0A3069;--shiki-dark:#CE9178">"How do I sort a list of dictionaries by key?"</span><span style="--shiki-light:#1F2328;--shiki-dark:#f3f7f6">}</span></span>

<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="long-context-prompting"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Long context prompting</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">When working with large documents or data-rich inputs (20k+ tokens), structure your prompt carefully to get the best results:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Put longform data at the top</strong>: Place your long documents and inputs near the top of your prompt, above your query, instructions, and examples. This can significantly improve performance across all models.</p>
<div class="flex w-full rounded-lg px-4 py-3 gap-1 items-start text-sm border-0.5 my-6 border-accent-100 bg-accent-100/10 callout"><div class="flex mr-2 shrink-0 pt-[1.375px] text-accent-100"><div style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 2.5a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 0 15 7.5 7.5 0 0 1 0-15m0 1a6.5 6.5 0 1 0 0 13 6.5 6.5 0 0 0 0-13m.1 5.51a.5.5 0 0 1 .4.49v3h1a.5.5 0 0 1 0 1h-3a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1h1V10h-1a.5.5 0 0 1 0-1H10zM10 6.5A.75.75 0 1 1 10 8a.75.75 0 0 1 0-1.5"></path></svg></div></div><div class="grow min-w-0 leading-relaxed [&amp;&gt;*:last-child]:mb-0 text-accent-000 [&amp;_li]:before:text-accent-000/60 [&amp;_blockquote]:border-l-accent-000/60 [&amp;_code]:text-accent-000 [&amp;_code]:bg-accent-000/10">Queries at the end can improve response quality by up to 30% in tests, especially with complex, multi-document inputs.</div></div>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Structure document content and metadata with XML tags</strong>: When using multiple documents, wrap each document in <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;document&gt;</code> tags with <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;document_content&gt;</code> and <code class="relative inline bg-bg-300 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-sm font-mono break-words box-decoration-clone">&lt;source&gt;</code> (and other metadata) subtags for clarity.</p>
<div data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden border border-border-300 rounded-lg my-6"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed" class="flex"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_34a6slfiuqkntiuuljb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_14a6slfiuqkntiuuljb_" class="group w-full flex items-center gap-2 p-4 text-left transparent hover:bg-bg-300 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-accent-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50" data-radix-collection-item=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="text-text-500 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 group-data-[state=&#x27;open&#x27;]:rotate-90" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M181.66,133.66l-80,80a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L164.69,128,90.34,53.66a8,8,0,0,1,11.32-11.32l80,80A8,8,0,0,1,181.66,133.66Z"></path></svg><span class="font-semibold text-text-100 flex-1 font-ui">Example multi-document structure</span></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_34a6slfiuqkntiuuljb_" hidden="" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-example-multi-document-structure" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"></div></div></div>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Ground responses in quotes</strong>: For long document tasks, ask Claude to quote relevant parts of the documents first before carrying out its task. This helps Claude cut through the noise of the rest of the document&#x27;s contents.</p>
<div data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden border border-border-300 rounded-lg my-6"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed" class="flex"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_36a6slfiuqkntiuuljb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_16a6slfiuqkntiuuljb_" class="group w-full flex items-center gap-2 p-4 text-left transparent hover:bg-bg-300 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-accent-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50" data-radix-collection-item=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="text-text-500 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 group-data-[state=&#x27;open&#x27;]:rotate-90" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M181.66,133.66l-80,80a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L164.69,128,90.34,53.66a8,8,0,0,1,11.32-11.32l80,80A8,8,0,0,1,181.66,133.66Z"></path></svg><span class="font-semibold text-text-100 flex-1 font-ui">Example quote extraction</span></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_36a6slfiuqkntiuuljb_" hidden="" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-example-quote-extraction" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"></div></div></div>
</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="model-self-knowledge"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center

<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">If you would like Claude to identify itself correctly in your application or use specific API strings:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="text-xs py-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-text-500">Sample prompt for model identity</div><div class="flex items-center gap-1"><button class="inline-flex

The current model is Claude Opus 4.7.</code></pre></div></div>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For LLM-powered apps that need to specify model strings:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="text-xs py-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-text-500">Sample prompt for model string</div><div class="flex items-center gap-1"><button class="inline-flex

          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy code"><div class="relative flex items-center justify-center"><div class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12.5 3A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 14 4.5V6h1.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 17 7.5v8a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5h-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 6 15.5V14H4.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 3 12.5v-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 4.5 3zm1.5 9.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H7v1.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5H14zM4.5 4a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5z"></path></svg></div><div class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15.188 5.11a.5.5 0 0 1 .752.626l-.056.084-7.5 9a.5.5 0 0 1-.738.033l-3.5-3.5-.064-.078a.501.501 0 0 1 .693-.693l.078.064 3.113 3.113 7.15-8.58z"></path></svg></div></div></button></div></div><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm overflow-x-auto code-block-scroll" tabindex="0"><pre class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><code>When an LLM is needed, please default to Claude Opus 4.7 unless the user requests otherwise. The exact model string for Claude Opus 4.7 is claude-opus-4-7.</code></pre></div></div>
<h2 class="font-heading leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="output-and-formatting"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.175em)]"><button class="inline-flex

<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="communication-style-and-verbosity"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Communication style and verbosity</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Claude&#x27;s latest models have a more concise and natural communication style compared to previous models:</p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">More direct and grounded:</strong> Provides fact-based progress reports rather than self-celebratory updates</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">More conversational:</strong> Slightly more fluent and colloquial, less machine-like</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]"><strong class="font-semibold">Less verbose:</strong> May skip detailed summaries for efficiency unless prompted otherwise</li>
</ul>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">This means Claude may skip verbal summaries after tool calls, jumping directly to the next action. If you prefer more visibility into its reasoning:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="text-xs py-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-text-500">Sample prompt</div><div class="flex items-center gap-1"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy code"><div class="relative flex items-center justify-center"><div class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12.5 3A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 14 4.5V6h1.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 17 7.5v8a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5h-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 6 15.5V14H4.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 3 12.5v-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 4.5 3zm1.5 9.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H7v1.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5H14zM4.5 4a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5z"></path></svg></div><div class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15.188 5.11a.5.5 0 0 1 .752.626l-.056.084-7.5 9a.5.5 0 0 1-.738.033l-3.5-3.5-.064-.078a.501.501 0 0 1 .693-.693l.078.064 3.113 3.113 7.15-8.58z"></path></svg></div></div></button></div></div><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm overflow-x-auto code-block-scroll" tabindex="0"><pre class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><code>After completing a task that involves tool use, provide a quick summary of the work you&#x27;ve done.</code></pre></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="control-the-format-of-responses"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Control the format of responses</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">There are a few particularly effective ways to steer output formatting:</p>
<ol class="list-none pl-8 [counter-reset:item] [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:[counter-reset:item] mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Tell Claude what to do instead of what not to do</strong></p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Instead of: &quot;Do not use markdown in your response&quot;</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Try: &quot;Your response should be composed of smoothly flowing prose paragraphs.&quot;</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Use XML format indicators</strong></p>
<ul class="list-none pl-8 [&amp;_ul]:pl-8 [&amp;_ol]:pl-8 mb-4">
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">Try: &quot;Write the prose sections of your response in &lt;smoothly_flowing_prose_paragraphs&gt; tags.&quot;</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Match your prompt style to the desired output</strong></p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">The formatting style used in your prompt may influence Claude&#x27;s response style. If you are still experiencing steerability issues with output formatting, try matching your prompt style to your desired output style as closely as possible. For example, removing markdown from your prompt can reduce the volume of markdown in the output.</p>
</li>
<li class="mb-2 last:mb-0 relative before:absolute before:left-[-2rem] before:w-6 before:text-center [ul&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[&#x27;•&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:before:content-[counter(item)&#x27;.&#x27;] [ol&gt;&amp;]:[counter-increment:item]">
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0"><strong class="font-semibold">Use detailed prompts for specific formatting preferences</strong></p>
<p>For more control over markdown and formatting usage, provide explicit guidance:</p>
</li>
</ol>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="text-xs py-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-text-500">Sample prompt to minimize markdown</div><div class="flex items-center gap-1"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy code"><div class="relative flex items-center justify-center"><div class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12.5 3A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 14 4.5V6h1.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 17 7.5v8a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5h-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 6 15.5V14H4.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 3 12.5v-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 4.5 3zm1.5 9.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H7v1.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5H14zM4.5 4a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5z"></path></svg></div><div class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15.188 5.11a.5.5 0 0 1 .752.626l-.056.084-7.5 9a.5.5 0 0 1-.738.033l-3.5-3.5-.064-.078a.501.501 0 0 1 .693-.693l.078.064 3.113 3.113 7.15-8.58z"></path></svg></div></div></button></div></div><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm overflow-x-auto code-block-scroll" tabindex="0"><pre class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><code>&lt;avoid_excessive_markdown_and_bullet_points&gt;
When writing reports, documents, technical explanations, analyses, or any long-form content, write in clear, flowing prose using complete paragraphs and sentences. Use standard paragraph breaks for organization and reserve markdown primarily for `inline code`, code blocks (```...```), and simple headings (###, and ###). Avoid using **bold** and *italics*.

DO NOT use ordered lists (1. ...) or unordered lists (*) unless : a) you&#x27;re presenting truly discrete items where a list format is the best option, or b) the user explicitly requests a list or ranking

Instead of listing items with bullets or numbers, incorporate them naturally into sentences. This guidance applies especially to technical writing. Using prose instead of excessive formatting will improve user satisfaction. NEVER output a series of overly short bullet points.

Your goal is readable, flowing text that guides the reader naturally through ideas rather than fragmenting information into isolated points.
&lt;/avoid_excessive_markdown_and_bullet_points&gt;</code></pre></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="la-te-x-output"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center

<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Claude Opus 4.6 defaults to LaTeX for mathematical expressions, equations, and technical explanations. If you prefer plain text, add the following instructions to your prompt:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="text-xs py-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-text-500">Sample prompt</div><div class="flex items-center gap-1"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent

          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy code"><div class="relative flex items-center justify-center"><div class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12.5 3A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 14 4.5V6h1.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 17 7.5v8a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5h-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 6 15.5V14H4.5A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 3 12.5v-8A1.5 1.5 0 0 1 4.5 3zm1.5 9.5a1.5 1.5 0 0 1-1.5 1.5H7v1.5a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5H14zM4.5 4a.5.5 0 0 0-.5.5v8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5.5h8a.5.5 0 0 0 .5-.5v-8a.5.5 0 0 0-.5-.5z"></path></svg></div><div class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" style="width:14px;height:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="absolute transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 opacity-0" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M15.188 5.11a.5.5 0 0 1 .752.626l-.056.084-7.5 9a.5.5 0 0 1-.738.033l-3.5-3.5-.064-.078a.501.501 0 0 1 .693-.693l.078.064 3.113 3.113 7.15-8.58z"></path></svg></div></div></button></div></div><div class="relative py-4 pl-4 font-mono text-sm md:text-sm overflow-x-auto code-block-scroll" tabindex="0"><pre class="inline-block min-w-full pr-4"><code>Format your response in plain text only. Do not use LaTeX, MathJax, or any markup notation such as \( \), $, or \frac{}{}. Write all math expressions using standard text characters (e.g., &quot;/&quot; for division, &quot;*&quot; for multiplication, and &quot;^&quot; for exponents).</code></pre></div></div>

<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Claude&#x27;s latest models excel at creating presentations, animations, and visual documents with impressive creative flair and strong instruction following. The models produce polished, usable output on the first try in most cases.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">For best results with document creation:</p>
<div class="group relative my-6 rounded-lg bg-bg-000 overflow-hidden border-0.5 border-border-300"><div class="group flex items-center justify-between border-b-0.5 border-border-300 px-4 py-1"><div class="text-xs py-1 flex items-center gap-2 text-text-500">Sample prompt</div><div class="flex items-center gap-1"><button class="inline-flex

Include thoughtful design elements, visual hierarchy, and engaging animations where appropriate.</code></pre></div></div>
<h3 class="text-xl font-medium leading-[1.25] text-text-100"><div class="group relative pt-6 pb-2" id="migrating-away-from-prefilled-responses"><div class="absolute hidden lg:flex lg:items-center lg:-ml-8 top-[calc(1.5rem+0.08em)]"><button class="inline-flex
  items-center
  justify-center
  relative
  isolate
  shrink-0
  can-focus
  select-none
  disabled:pointer-events-none
  disabled:opacity-50
  disabled:shadow-none
  disabled:drop-shadow-none border-transparent
          transition
          font-base
          duration-300
          ease-[cubic-bezier(0.165,0.85,0.45,1)] h-6 w-6 rounded-md opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity duration-200 text-text-500 hover:text-text-100 Button_fill__JiIcX Button_ghost__BUAoh" type="button" aria-label="Copy link to clipboard" title="Copy link to clipboard" data-state="closed"><div class="inline" style="width:20px;height:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center"><svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="flex-shrink:0" class="inline" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M13.623 9.648a.5.5 0 0 1 .648.281l1.008 2.559a4 4 0 0 1-7.363 3.122l-.08-.19-1.008-2.558a.5.5 0 0 1 .93-.367l1.008 2.558a3 3 0 1 0 5.583-2.198l-1.008-2.559a.5.5 0 0 1 .282-.648M8.9 7.208a.5.5 0 0 1 .649.283l1.833 4.652a.5.5 0 0 1-.931.366L8.619 7.857a.5.5 0 0 1 .281-.649M7.17 2.253a4 4 0 0 1 4.994 2.327l1.008 2.558a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366l-1.009-2.558a3 3 0 0 0-5.582 2.199L6.66 9.704a.5.5 0 0 1-.93.366L4.72 7.51a4 4 0 0 1 2.255-5.187z"></path></svg></div></button></div><div>Migrating away from prefilled responses</div><div class="absolute top-0 -right-6 hidden lg:flex"></div></div></h3>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Starting with Claude 4.6 models and <a class="inline-link" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://anthropic.com/glasswing">Claude Mythos Preview</a>, prefilled responses on the last assistant turn are no longer supported. On Mythos Preview, requests with prefilled assistant messages return a 400 error. Model intelligence and instruction following has advanced such that most use cases of prefill no longer require it. Existing models will continue to support prefills, and adding assistant messages elsewhere in the conversation is not affected.</p>
<p class="mb-2 last:mb-0">Here are common prefill scenarios and how to migrate away from them:</p>
<div data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden border border-border-300 rounded-lg my-6"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed" class="flex"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_1deslfiuqkntiuuljb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_deslfiuqkntiuuljb_" class="group w-full flex items-center gap-2 p-4 text-left transparent hover:bg-bg-300 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-accent-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50" data-radix-collection-item=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="text-text-500 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 group-data-[state=&#x27;open&#x27;]:rotate-90" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M181.66,133.66l-80,80a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L164.69,128,90.34,53.66a8,8,0,0,1,11.32-11.32l80,80A8,8,0,0,1,181.66,133.66Z"></path></svg><span class="font-semibold text-text-100 flex-1 font-ui">Controlling output formatting</span></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_1deslfiuqkntiuuljb_" hidden="" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-controlling-output-formatting" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"></div></div></div>
<div data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden border border-border-300 rounded-lg my-6"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed" class="flex"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_1dislfiuqkntiuuljb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_dislfiuqkntiuuljb_" class="group w-full flex items-center gap-2 p-4 text-left transparent hover:bg-bg-300 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-accent-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50" data-radix-collection-item=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="text-text-500 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 group-data-[state=&#x27;open&#x27;]:rotate-90" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M181.66,133.66l-80,80a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L164.69,128,90.34,53.66a8,8,0,0,1,11.32-11.32l80,80A8,8,0,0,1,181.66,133.66Z"></path></svg><span class="font-semibold text-text-100 flex-1 font-ui">Eliminating preambles</span></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_1dislfiuqkntiuuljb_" hidden="" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-eliminating-preambles" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"></div></div></div>
<div data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden border border-border-300 rounded-lg my-6"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed" class="flex"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_1dmslfiuqkntiuuljb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_dmslfiuqkntiuuljb_" class="group w-full flex items-center gap-2 p-4 text-left transparent hover:bg-bg-300 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-accent-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50" data-radix-collection-item=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="text-text-500 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 group-data-[state=&#x27;open&#x27;]:rotate-90" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M181.66,133.66l-80,80a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L164.69,128,90.34,53.66a8,8,0,0,1,11.32-11.32l80,80A8,8,0,0,1,181.66,133.66Z"></path></svg><span class="font-semibold text-text-100 flex-1 font-ui">Avoiding bad refusals</span></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_1dmslfiuqkntiuuljb_" hidden="" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-avoiding-bad-refusals" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"></div></div></div>
<div data-orientation="vertical"><div data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden border border-border-300 rounded-lg my-6"><h3 data-orientation="vertical" data-state="closed" class="flex"><button type="button" aria-controls="radix-_R_1dqslfiuqkntiuuljb_" aria-expanded="false" data-state="closed" data-orientation="vertical" id="radix-_R_dqslfiuqkntiuuljb_" class="group w-full flex items-center gap-2 p-4 text-left transparent hover:bg-bg-300 focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-offset-2 focus-visible:outline-accent-100 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50" data-radix-collection-item=""><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="14" height="14" fill="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 256 256" class="text-text-500 transition-transform duration-200 flex-shrink-0 group-data-[state=&#x27;open&#x27;]:rotate-90" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M181.66,133.66l-80,80a8,8,0,0,1-11.32-11.32L164.69,128,90.34,53.66a8,8,0,0,1,11.32-11.32l80,80A8,8,0,0,1,181.66,133.66Z"></path></svg><span class="font-semibold text-text-100 flex-1 font-ui">Continuations</span></button></h3><div data-state="closed" id="radix-_R_1dqslfiuqkntiuuljb_" hidden="" role="region" aria-labelledby="accordion-continuations" data-orientation="vertical" class="overflow-hidden" style="--radix-accordion-content-height:var(--radix-collapsible-content-height);--radix-accordion-content-width:var(--radix-collapsible-content-width)"></div></div></div>
